en: [[3]]s into a battle, inspires allies every [[12]]s for [[6]]s. Inspired allies increase their ATK by [[14%]] and Phys & Magic DEF by [[30%]], and recover [[20]] Energy every second.

en: When casting the skill, also increases allies' Haste by [[20]].
